title: Scenes Definition
description: Defines the structure for scenes.json in each video project

video_title.description: Title of the video, used for file naming

fps.description: Frames per second for the video

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this file was created

captions_srt_path.description: Path to generated .srt sidecar (relative to video root or absolute).

title.description: Short descriptive title for the scene

script_text.description: Full script text for context (narration + visual description)

voiceover_text.description: Exact words to be spoken by the TTS voice

voiceover_file.description: Path to generated audio file, relative to video root

voiceover_hash.description: SHA-256 of (text, voice, rate, volume, pitch). Used to skip unchanged re-generation.

target_duration_seconds.description: Estimated duration in seconds before audio generation

actual_duration_seconds.description: Real duration measured from generated audio file

render_status.description: Current render progress for this scene

render_attempts.description: Number of times this scene has been attempted to render

last_render_error.description: Most recent render error message (cleared on success).

captions.description: Per-scene caption cues for the burned-in Remotion layer or for SRT generation.

start.description: Start time, seconds, relative to scene start

end.description: End time, seconds, relative to scene start

scene_file.description: Path to rendered scene video, relative to video root

stitched_file.description: Path to stitched scene (video+audio), relative to video root

visual_notes.description: Visual treatment for the scene, populated by Step 7 (Style Definition). Specifies colors, animations, layout, and elements based on the style guide.

total_actual_seconds.description: Sum of all actual durations (null until measured)
